info.name: Fix It Now remote
info.description:
# 🛠️ Fix It Now API

## Project Description

**Fix It Now API** is a RESTful backend for a home service booking platform. Customers can book services, make Stripe payments, and leave reviews. Technicians manage their profiles and services, while admins verify technicians and manage categories. The API is built with **Express.js**, **TypeScript**, **Prisma**, **PostgreSQL**, **JWT**, **Zod**, and **Stripe**.

## 📂 Modules

- **Authentication** – Register, login, and JWT authentication.
    
- **User** – User profile management.
    
- **Technician** – Technician profile and verification.
    
- **Category** – Service category management.
    
- **Service** – Service CRUD operations.
    
- **Booking** – Booking creation and management.
    
- **Payment** – Stripe Checkout and webhook handling.
    
- **Review** – Review management.
    
- **Admin** – Technician verification and category management.

item.description:
## 🔐 Authentication

The Authentication module allows users to register and log in to the system. After a successful login, the API returns a JWT access token, which must be included in the `Authorization` header to access protected endpoints.

**Access:** Public (Register & Login)  
**Authentication Required:** No

item.name: category

response.name: get all

item.description:
## 📂 Category

The Category module manages service categories used to organize services on the platform.

- **View Categories:** Public
    
- **Create, Update, Delete:** Admin only
    
- **Authentication:** Requires a valid HTTP-only authentication cookie.

item.name: get all reviews by technician id

item.description:
## 👨‍🔧 Technician

The Technician module allows technicians to create and manage their profiles, update availability, manage bookings, and create services after admin verification. It also provides public access to technician profiles and reviews.

- **Public:** View technicians, technician profiles, and reviews.
    
- **Technician:** Create/update profile, manage availability, view own profile and bookings.
    
- **Admin:** Verify technician profiles.
    
- **Authentication:** Protected routes require a valid HTTP-only authentication cookie.

response.name: get all reviews by service id

item.description:
## 🛠️ Service

The Service module allows verified technicians to create and manage their service listings. Customers and other users can browse available services, view service details, and read customer reviews.

- **Public:** View all services and service reviews.
    
- **Customer:** View service details.
    
- **Technician:** Create, update, delete, and manage their own services.
    
- **Admin:** View service details.
    
- **Authentication:** Protected routes require a valid HTTP-only authentication cookie.

item.name: booking
get all booking by log in user

response.name: get all booking by log in user

item.description:
## 📅 Booking

The Booking module allows customers to book services and manage their bookings. Technicians can view assigned bookings and update their status, while customers can cancel bookings before they are completed.

- **Customer:** Create bookings, view bookings, view booking details, and cancel bookings.
    
- **Technician:** View assigned bookings and update booking status.
    
- **Admin:** View booking details.
    
- **Authentication:** Protected routes require a valid HTTP-only authentication cookie.

response.name: get all category
get all reviews

item.description:
## 👑 Admin

The Admin module provides platform management features. Administrators can manage users, monitor bookings, view categories and reviews, and control user account status.

- **Access:** Admin only.
    
- **Features:** Manage users, update user status, view all bookings, categories, and reviews.
    
- **Authentication:** Requires a valid HTTP-only authentication cookie.

item.name: payment
get all payment by log in user

response.name: get all payment by log in user

item.name: get payment details by payment id

item.description:
## 💳 Payment

The Payment module manages Stripe payment processing for accepted bookings. Customers can create a Stripe Checkout session, view their payment history, and access payment details. Stripe webhooks automatically verify successful payments and update the payment and booking status.

- **Customer:** Create checkout sessions and view payment history/details.
    
- **Stripe:** Sends webhook events for payment verification.
    
- **Public:** Payment success/cancel response page.
    
- **Authentication:** Protected customer routes require a valid HTTP-only authentication cookie.

item.name: reviews
get all reviews by log in user

response.name: get all reviews by log in user

item.description:
## ⭐ Review

The Review module allows customers to share feedback after completing a service. Customers can create, update, and delete their own reviews, while all users can view review details.

- **Public:** View review details.
    
- **Customer:** Create, update, delete, and view their own reviews.
    
- **Admin:** Delete any review.
    
- **Authentication:** Protected routes require a valid HTTP-only authentication cookie.

item.description:
## 👤 User

The User module allows authenticated users to manage their account information, including updating their profile details and changing their password.

- **Access:** Authenticated users (Admin, Customer, Technician).
    
- **Features:** Update profile information and change account password.
    
- **Authentication:** Requires a valid HTTP-only authentication cookie.
